name: Iwao Washizu
description: A wealthy old man and one of the most powerful people in Japan, thanks to shady dealings and consultations he performed in Japan's post-war period. Now, fearful of his encroaching death, he uses his money to tempt people - especially young men - to bet their lives on the chance to win a large amount of money. name: Kanan Zebul
description: Kanan Takakiyo, at first glance, is an ordinary teenage girl who is president of her high school's public morals committee. However, this is all a facade - her true identity is Kanan Zebel, a thousand-year-old demon who is the daughter of Beelzebub, the Great Demon of Gluttony. Eager to consume human souls, she descended to the human world and used hypnotism to convince an ordinary family that she was their firstborn - all so that she could find a student to consume. Since birth, Psyche possessed the divine power to heal. She was capable of healing minor to relatively major wounds on her own body, and on those of others within a certain vicinity. name: Rinne Ohara
description: She is one of the daughters of the three families. She is a recluse who lives a nocturnal lifestyle, and goes out of the house only at night. While blunt and curt to a fault, she romantically considers herself a "princess." Five years ago, she was taken away by spirits, and she has never told anyone. What does she know about Setsuna?

name: Tamahiko Shima
description: A young man born into a wealthy family in Meiji 38. A year before the manga starts, he was in a car accident that resulted in his mother dying and the loss of complete use of his right arm. He was given his family's mansion in Chiba, and a bride was purchased to assist him for ¥200,000.

name: Yuuta Takemoto
description: __Height__: 170 cm (5'7") Yuuta Takemoto is a second-year student at the art college. He is from Annaka city, Gunma-ken. He lives in the same apartment complex as Mayama and Morita in room 202. His floormates are Morita and Hasegawa. Takemoto studies architecture, but has little certainty as to what he wishes to do upon graduating; his decision to attend art college was because he liked to build things with his hands, like he had with his father. name: Zel
description: As an elf, he's over 200 years old. He's one of the founding members of the Interspecies Reviewers. ~!In his female form, he's called "Zellie"!~

name: Zephyr
description: Protagonist of the story "Doom Breaker". Zephyr is the last human fighting evil in a world abandoned by the gods. When he is killed in battle by Tartarus, the god of destruction, all hope for humanity seems lost. But Zephyr’s fate is not sealed - the gods who find his battles entertaining have gifted him a second chance at life, as he is sent ten years into the past, back to when he was a slave instead of the most powerful human alive.

name: Abyss no Ishi

The real form of the Will of the Abyss is Alice with white hair and clothing. It was thought that the Will of the Abyss wanted Oz and Alice to go back in the Abyss. The Will of the Abyss and Alice are somehow connected.
